query: SELECT id, title, CASE WHEN audioUrl IS NULL THEN 'NO_AUDIO' ELSE 'HAS_AUDIO' END as hasAudio, CASE WHEN lyrics IS NULL THEN 'NO_LYRICS' ELSE 'HAS_LYRICS' END as hasLyrics FROM songs WHERE sheetMusicAbc IS NULL ORDER BY id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27tCrNWdmQHZC2L.1303e64f5668 --database Q3oEbCsP6DUj527aoyypq7 --execute SELECT id, title, CASE WHEN audioUrl IS NULL THEN 'NO_AUDIO' ELSE 'HAS_AUDIO' END as hasAudio, CASE WHEN lyrics IS NULL THEN 'NO_LYRICS' ELSE 'HAS_LYRICS' END as hasLyrics FROM songs WHERE sheetMusicAbc IS NULL ORDER BY id
